They are suitable for all your hot and cold drinks and, thanks to their neutral appearance, can be combined with every menu or packaging concept These all-purpose cups are widely used by food-service and catering companies, in offices & canteens, during events, festivals & trade shows for hot drinks Lightweight - Water Resistance The lightweight cups are made of sturdy, leak-proof cardboard and, thanks to the rolled rim, are pleasant to drink out of. The water-resistant cups are also hygienic and easy to use, stack and take off the stack one at a time. Kraft Paper Cups Cup sleeves are available to make the cups extra comfortable to hold when the contents are very hot. This rippled wall also allows for a better grip, reducing the chance of slipping or spilling the piping hot beverage within the cup. Rippled Wall The outside of each cup features a unique ripped wall design that eliminates the need for a compatible cup sleeve to prevent burns. User-Friendly PLA Coating For superior durability, this cup boasts a PLA coating inside the cup to resist condensation accumulation also to keep beverages warmer, longer. Sip Through Lids The sipping hole of this lid accepts stirrers and straws, while the cut-out or push top design allows for comfortable, easy sipping. Rolled Rim The cup has a tightly rolled rim that provides mess-free sipping and creates a tight and secure seal when used with a compatible lid.
